untranslatable_reason: Signal requires computing a ratio of two external indices (DJT/SPX) and a moving average of that ratio (sma_25 applied to ratio). The allowed indicator list does not include: (1) external index data sources (DJT, SPX), (2) ratio computation between two series, or (3) moving averages of derived ratios. The sma_25 indicator is also not in the allowed list (only sma_5, sma_10, sma_20, sma_40, sma_50, sma_80, sma_100, sma_200 are available). This requires custom preprocessing or external data integration outside the backtest engine scope.
translation_notes: This is an inter-market regime signal (Dow Transport/S&P 500 ratio) that requires external index data and ratio calculations. Implementation would need: (1) DJT and SPX price feeds, (2) custom ratio calculation, (3) SMA(25) applied to the ratio series. Consider extending the engine to support ratio indicators or pre-compute the ratio as a custom indicator before backtesting.
